summary: Sleek circular progress countdown timer component for Remotion.

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/countdown-circle/src/CountdownCircle.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `CountdownCircle` and `countdownCircleDefaultProps`, then register the `CountdownCircle` composition with duration 120, fps 30, width 1920, and height 1080.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Countdown Circle Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/countdown-circle to my project. Preserve the exported CountdownCircleProps API and register the CountdownCircle composition with the default props.
